## 人工知能 2026年度

全14回。最終回は**手書き数字を読み取る機械**を PyTorch で自作する。

<div id="lecture-search">
  <input id="search-input" type="search" placeholder="全文検索 — どの回に出てきたか探せる（例：MSE、過学習、シグモイド）" autocomplete="off">
  <div id="search-results"></div>
</div>

<style>
#lecture-search { margin: 0.5em 0 0.9em; }
#search-input {
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  border: 2px solid #5dade2;
  border-radius: 6px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  background: #fff;
}
#search-results { margin-top: 6px; max-height: 45vh; overflow-y: auto; }
#search-results a.search-hit {
  display: block;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  margin: 5px 0;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #333;
  background: #fafafa;
}
#search-results a.search-hit:hover { background: #eaf4fb; border-color: #5dade2; }
#search-results .hit-loc { font-weight: bold; color: #2980b9; }
#search-results mark { background: #fff3a0; padding: 0 2px; }
#search-results .search-note { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #888; padding: 4px 10px; }
#lecture-search a[href]::after { content: none !important; display: none !important; }
</style>

<details open>
<summary>導入</summary>

- [人工知能概論](ai-introduction.qmd)

</details>

<details open>
<summary>分類問題と特徴量</summary>

- [1次元分類の基礎](classification-basics-1d.qmd)
- [2次元の決定境界](classification-2d-boundaries.qmd)
- [過学習と汎化](classification-evaluation.qmd)
- [教師なし学習・クラスタリング](clustering-kmeans.qmd)
- [次元の呪いと次元削減](dimensionality-pca.qmd)

</details>

<details open>
<summary>fit() の中身を開ける</summary>

- [最適化と勾配降下法](optimization-gradient-descent.qmd)
- [線形回帰と正則化](linear-regression.qmd)
- [ニューラルネットワークの最小単位](nn-single-unit.qmd)
- [変換を重ねる](nn-multilayer.qmd)
- [バックプロパゲーション](nn-backprop.qmd)
- [実装：NumPyだけでNN](nn-numpy.qmd)
- [PyTorch入門](pytorch-intro.qmd)
- [手書き数字分類プロジェクト](mnist-project.qmd)

</details>

<details>
<summary>参考資料（回数外）</summary>

- [Newton法](newton-method-appendix.qmd)
- [ローカルミニマムの罠](optimization-local-minima-appendix.qmd)

</details>

<script>
document.querySelectorAll("details").forEach(d => {
  const links = d.querySelectorAll("a[href]").length;
  const total = d.querySelectorAll("li").length;
  const s = d.querySelector("summary");
  if (total > 0) s.textContent += `  [${links}/${total}]`;
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.target && /^(INPUT|TEXTAREA)$/.test(e.target.tagName)) return;
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'PageUp') {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
  }
}, true);

(function() {
  try {
    var index = null;
    var input = document.getElementById('search-input');
    var resultsEl = document.getElementById('search-results');
    if (!input || !resultsEl) return;

    function esc(s) {
      return String(s).replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
    }

    function loadIndex() {
      if (index !== null) return Promise.resolve(index);
      return fetch('search.json')
        .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
        .then(function(d) {
          index = d.filter(function(e) { return e.href.indexOf('index.html') !== 0; });
          return index;
        });
    }

    function snippet(text, q) {
      var i = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q);
      if (i < 0) return '';
      var start = Math.max(0, i - 35);
      var end = Math.min(text.length, i + q.length + 50);
      return ((start > 0 ? '…' : '') + esc(text.slice(start, i)) +
              '<mark>' + esc(text.slice(i, i + q.length)) + '</mark>' +
              esc(text.slice(i + q.length, end)) +
              (end < text.length ? '…' : '')).replace(/\n+/g, ' ');
    }

    function run() {
      var q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      if (q.length < 2) {
        resultsEl.innerHTML = q.length === 1
          ? '<div class="search-note">2文字以上で検索</div>' : '';
        return;
      }
      loadIndex().then(function(idx) {
        var hits = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < idx.length && hits.length < 30; i++) {
          var e = idx[i];
          var hay = (e.title + '\n' + (e.section || '') + '\n' + (e.text || '')).toLowerCase();
          if (hay.indexOf(q) >= 0) hits.push(e);
        }
        if (hits.length === 0) {
          resultsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="search-note">ヒットなし</div>';
          return;
        }
        resultsEl.innerHTML = hits.map(function(e) {
          var href = e.href.replace('#', '#/');
          var loc = esc(e.title) + (e.section ? ' › ' + esc(e.section) : '');
          return '<a class="search-hit" href="' + href + '">' +
                 '<span class="hit-loc">' + loc + '</span><br>' +
                 snippet(e.text || '', q) + '</a>';
        }).join('');
      }).catch(function() {
        resultsEl.innerHTML =
          '<div class="search-note">検索インデックスを読み込めませんでした</div>';
      });
    }

    var timer = null;
    input.addEventListener('input', function() {
      clearTimeout(timer);
      timer = setTimeout(run, 120);
    });
  } catch (e) {}
})();
</script>
